note: One row per (policymaker, policy_area, source). A policymaker may have multiple claims per policy area across different sources/dates; the viz layer aggregates them. Stance is -2..2 per policy-areas.json. Entries prefixed EXAMPLE_ are format placeholders and must be removed before the viz consumes real data.
field_reference: See schema.md in the parent directory for field definitions and required/optional status.
